{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201704244C40F4C9F2ADD03A46BD"}"},"total":1144},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7430700877617775385","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"最吸引人的莫过于其独特的故事情节了。“灵魂互换”的桥段虽然在小说中不算罕见，但作者却能够将这样一个老梗玩出新花样，让整个故事充满了惊喜。随着主角们逐渐适应对方的生活，并开始尝试从另一个角度去理解彼此，一系列爆笑而又温暖人心的情景随之而来。男女主形象鲜明立体，性格互补。男生乐观积极的态度与女生冷静理智的性格形成了强烈对比，也正因为这样的差异，在他们互换身份之后所产生的一系列冲突和误解才显得更加有趣。更重要的是，两人在经历了这段特殊时期后都获得了成长，学会了更好地珍惜眼前人。","text_exts":[{"e":23,"s":19,"text":"灵魂互换","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%81%B5%E9%AD%82%E4%BA%92%E6%8D%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773997464D03A46BD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227430700877617775385%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227288533172105514046%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%81%B5%E9%AD%82%E4%BA%92%E6%8D%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730100968,"group_id":"7288533172105514046","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9Jr5ru6qwQ+fBETEw4ZgXQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"442463066526699","user_name":"荆国的青儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"442463066526699","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7288533172105514046","book_info":{"abstract":"（新书刚开分导致分低，甜文放心入）
【单女主+恋爱日常+姐弟恋+灵魂互换+无系统】
女追男，女主情商高主打攻心。
“每个人的身上都有一种隐性磁场，当两个磁场相吸的人受到一定的外界扰动后，两个人的灵魂就会发生交换。”
——
青湾大学信息学院的沈栀梦，是出了名的高岭之花，成绩好，长相好，身材好，但性格怪异身边几乎没有朋友，到了大三也没有和任何男生传过绯闻。
某一天，学校里的人发现这朵高岭之花身边多了一个男生，叫李墨川。
都说这个男生只不过是沈栀梦的舔狗罢了，假男女朋友而已，毕竟两人一起的时候没有什么亲密接触。
直到某一天，校园论坛上爆出一张照片。
在学校的某一处，那个冰山脸院花将李墨川抵在树下，捏着人家的下巴亲。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7d79c601c0e9ff0360fc73073add0acc~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"町羽","author_id":"","book_id":"7288533172105514046","book_name":"可恶！和学姐灵魂互换后疯狂心动","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0d0c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2978人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":831,"name":"灵魂互换","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=831&name=灵魂互换&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7288533218934932030","read_count":"2978","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"283210"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"147","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,单女主,灵魂互换,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/02e30885c74d1ceb5e70c9f1d46e80b1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181464&x-signature=M%2F4YQftO0swwouSn0pGZA8jKMRg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"752496438422052","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201704244C40F4C9F2ADD03A46BD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7525,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3248},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7379669710709687064","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大写的非常棒，我在番茄已经很久没有看到这么好看的书了。不管是男主前期的直男表现，还是女主人前人后的反差，都很不错。[吃瓜]还有那些说23章写得不好的，建议先真正的带入男主的视角想想，男主之前先是暗恋了三年姜，结果打算表白的时候发现人家官宣有有男朋友了。你们能想象那种心情吗？这对当时的纯情小男主的打击肯定是非常大的，导致男主后来看起来又怂又自卑的样子“万一呢？万一她不喜欢我呢？”你们这些家伙没谈过恋爱，暗恋又是见一个爱一个肯定是体会不到这种感觉的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718216653,"group_id":"7288533172105514046","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyHCnN+kE+t8MQ3o2Lpf4b5maX+MVunWkCKEX70Y06PZ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/user-avatar/7df8c430a58d86c7260fd4df92d5a7ec~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529166&x-signature=cvKu8yyIqLmV9RAywdhcDBJIUaw%3D","user_id":"4309741530523656","user_name":"小柒俊来"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4309741530523656","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7288533172105514046","book_info":{"abstract":"（新书刚开分导致分低，甜文放心入）
